title: Transformation using Heat-Shock
steps: Add plasmid DNA (1 µL of miniprep/2 µL of ligation mixture/...µL of cesium-purified DNA).
Heat shock at exactly 42ºC for exactly 1:30 minutes, then chill on ice again for 5 minutes.
Culture in 1 mL SOC for 1 hour at 37ºC and pre-warm the agar plates in the meantime.
Spin the culture down at 3000rpm for 3 minutes, discard 900 µL and resuspend the pellet in the remaining 100 µL.
Plate accordingly on agar plates with the appropriate antibiotic, if applicable.
creator: Alba Balletbó
